action.reasoning: Observation: test_policy.py shows 0/15 success; explored rates are very low (~0.25) suggesting the robot stops early. Analysis: The HeuristicPlanner.select_action returns None when all node utilities are zero (common at episode start, as no frontiers scanned). This causes the episode to terminate immediately after the first few steps. The fix: when global_best_u == 0, fall back to a random neighbor (or the first neighbor) to continue exploring. Also fix reconstruct_path bug (goal_idx -> target_idx). This should allow the robot to keep moving and eventually discover frontiers, boosting success rate significantly. Decision: edit predict.py with this fallback, test locally to confirm success > 0.5, then submit eval to regain baseline ~0.55 and potentially exceed it.
